raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The text claims to introduce a novel method but does not provide any contrast or contextualization against prior work.",
    "R1.7": "The text cites one work but does not engage with it in depth, and there is no evidence of an audit of every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The text asserts uncertainty disclosure for some claims but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on the internal coherence and prose of the paragraph rather than the agent's output.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but does not identify harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "The text blends sources without traceability; non-cosmetic changes are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The text claims to introduce a novel method but does not provide any contrast or contextualization against prior work.
rationale.R1.7: The text cites one work but does not engage with it in depth, and there is no evidence of an audit of every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The text asserts uncertainty disclosure for some claims but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on the internal coherence and prose of the paragraph rather than the agent's output.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but does not identify harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: The text blends sources without traceability; non-cosmetic changes are not annotated with source and reason.
